title: GreenText
description: A mod that turns your text to green with ">".
body:
# GreenText
_Become 4channer with this_

A simple Fabric mod that makes messages starting with `>` appear green in chat.

## Features

- Messages starting with `>` will be displayed in green
- Messages starting with `>:` are excluded (for emoticons)
- Server-side recommended, client-side can work but it's likely you will see greentext yourself only.
- Supports Minecraft versions 1.16 through 1.21.8
